name: Anticipation pattern confidence boost
hypothesis: Increasing bootstrap pattern confidence from 0.6 to 0.65 will produce more relevant suggestions without overriding learned patterns

actions.description: Update bootstrap pattern confidence scores from 0.6 to 0.65
actions.command: python3 -c "import json; data=json.load(open('anticipation/prediction_memory.json')); [p.update({'confidence': 0.65}) for p in data.get('patterns', []) if p.get('source') == 'bootstrap' and p.get('confidence', 0) == 0.6]; json.dump(data, open('anticipation/prediction_memory.json', 'w'), indent=2)"

notes: Small bounded parameter change — rollback is trivial
